title: crucifera ruderalis
intro: Crucifera ruderalis, also known as wild cannabis or hemp, is a subspecies of the Cannabis sativa plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high CBD content and low THC levels, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Crucifera ruderalis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Crucifera ruderalis can include teas, tinctures, and topicals, and it can also be used as a food supplement in the form of hemp seeds and oil.
